textByHashes.eb66a46fa87b2afb879bf53d1d961e4972515515: Good day to you, adventurer! No doubt you are keen to become a member of the Legends' Guild?
textByHashes.9906bd157eb498767c328f06070a471da9c6a173: Well, you'll need to complete a quest for us as proof that you've got what it takes to be a Legend. How do you fancy mapping the Kharazi Jungle? It's the unexplored southern part of Karamja Island.
textByHashes.9a1b5ac62a28482b5c9ce5035c53398318f494ac: We'd also like you to befriend a Kharazi tribesman, and bring back a token of the tribe's friendship. The Legends' Guild has allies in all corners of the map, and we could always use more.
textByHashes.4b809217108ea3ae57c32c83553bb3e29b34587e: What do you say? Are you interested in this quest?
textByHashes.b2c3c424c9ae9bdf0471d027e1c57d96c4b0b755: Excellent! I've already started mapping the jungle myself. You can take my research to help you along.
textByHashes.31f1ae9804855aea1d6fe604f298bcd83c72d364: Complete this map when you get to the Kharazi Jungle. It's in the southernmost part of Karamja.
textByHashes.caa3489d2bf90dd0c9db47bab278462cb696bcb3: There's three sections I want you to focus on.
textByHashes.7ac1cadc16b21a853f25b8922851d12066170bfe: You'll need additional papyrus and charcoal to complete the map, of course.
textByHashes.e2676d88785baee3885896938c82b83d84534cd8: It is likely to be very tough going. You'll need an axe and machete to cut through the dense Kharazi Jungle, so collect a machete from the cupboard before you leave. You'll need to find your own axe, preferably a
textByHashes.bc96c168b32770142a7c95341032fbf4629ef751: Finally, whatever token of friendship you bring back must be fit to display in our hall. I'll know if it's some cheap knock-off, and I will not be best pleased.
textByHashes.43ae254b4dcca39e4d9fb10341924ff3e5893612: All that aside, I wish you the very best of luck!
textByHashes.03f4dd1847728b1e17a7d648bec4c7a30f8179ca: Very well, if you change your mind, please come back and see me.
textByHashes.5f5b618d79a4e4c08729fdb7843e4c63edeff855: My name is Radimus Erkle. I am the Grand Vizier of the Legends' Guild. Are you interested in becoming a member?
textByHashes.fb7a55fbe230e485915f4291f884835a4a65a8da: Hello there, how is the quest going?
textByHashes.47df809c003f97d514e4936ce14f7c3015437c8e: Taken one too many hits to the noggin, have you? Here's what I want you to do.
textByHashes.ab23ea33d1bbce75f049be6aae14cc5a48d7b464: You need to find a way into the Kharazi Jungle.
textByHashes.a4c8028dfa420548871022aee775fd39dc8607c2: Then you need to explore and map the three areas I asked you to.
textByHashes.cb46e3846a4a12b8059af5a6a0fd503a83c8e21a: While you're there you need to make contact with the Kharazi tribe and establish friendly relations.
textByHashes.4d94d4073cd7eba7c0cb904d084363f32685548e: As proof of all this, I want you to bring back the completed map and a token of the Kharazi's esteem - something we can put on display.
textByHashes.6b95d236c4620ee880506aa8b891af5757117052: Oh dear! Well, luckily one of those friendly foresters sent me a copy. But I'll need to charge you a fee of 30 Gold Pieces. The cost of postage these days is horrendous...
textByHashes.f609feb247ff84a676d69c47b6d907c8d28ddcc0: It looks as though you don't have the funds for it at the moment. How irritating...
textByHashes.03b13b687fba2d5f2590064b6a95ba5832282023: Right then. Please don't lose this one.
textByHashes.085d6bfebb3471aa85ee0dcb23fff2c9082af5b0: Well, that's your decision, of course.. but you won't be able to complete the quest without it. Now, if you'll excuse me, I have other business to attend to.
textByHashes.886ffd183d5fa177e6191dee1a5ed030bf678463: Well, just get another one from the cupboard.
textByHashes.d9887b50fc2660019f41dc39c16fcfdfe4ad3028: Well, get some more! Have a little initiative, would you?
textByHashes.ea599b4b55f1abe0dc3a85f34e93a0bfe944b833: It's hardly legendary to fail a quest because you can't find a little bit of burnt wood!
textByHashes.d59005a472c482d257855d673a30e9e79bf00001: It's hardly legendary to fail a quest because you can't find some papyrus!
textByHashes.ce6d57561b5e398befe8793a6c138352c31be69d: Excellent! Does this mean you have a suitable gift from the Kharazi? Becoming a legend is more than just fighting you know. It also requires some careful diplomacy and problem solving skills.
textByHashes.3de067dacb459b3c70c1264996c1a43a284b3f45: I'd like to see the completed map, too.
textByHashes.6e209c947d04b58996d39a4016ca4e7bd6556d54: Well, it looks as if you have something interesting there. Let's have a look!
textByHashes.e5c5af413f13bd395c1d234a964316005c0a1eed: This totem pole will take pride of place in the Legends' Guild, as a reminder of your quest. The legends of the future will surely be inspired by such a feat of craftsmanship.
textByHashes.573a26f4f71357f482fc1b29f6df2950bc6cd7e3: Well, you've completed the tasks I set you. That map of the Kharazi jungle will be very helpful for future expeditions.
textByHashes.4d1ecf82d7db8154d012c7167ee451bbd041a9ab: Congratulations, welcome to the Legends' Guild. Please, go through to the main Legends' Guild building, and I will join you shortly.
textByHashes.e898f6ee07da7e3827c67111ad0515dae755de3e: Congratulations, welcome to the Legends' Guild. Please, go through to the main Legends' Guild building and I will join you shortly.
textByHashes.84d09e59191d35e2a1d01d2001c0e1e069673b1a: Welcome to the Legends' Guild Main Hall. As you can see, the totem pole you brought us has pride of place. Every member of the Legends' Guild can see it as soon as they come through the doors, and they'll know that it
textByHashes.bcc86ab5e76aa4b5a934d872b66993d8aa00e430: was you who brought it back.
textByHashes.c743cc0438272d564eab6c5cbd90f5568cff6398: Now that you're a fully-fledged member of the guild, I'd like to offer you some training. Shall we get started now?
textByHashes.7ab1a8e5fc119ca671706049b9ccc23c64830038: You can choose four skills to increase your abilities in.
textByHashes.3fc8b48e8eee2dd36a7f34e40bb05f1f0ab55d45: You can choose three skills to increase your abilities in.
textByHashes.3383a6b30dc7ad5c630af059d4d7a37f9a78153e: You can choose two skills to increase your abilities in.
textByHashes.1896cced768bfce70afc9737063358560cfd1ad0: You can choose one skills to increase your abilities in.
textByHashes.3360031ab77482f8edf53653f880652e932b5627: Right, that's all the training I can offer you. I hope you're happy with your new skills. Do feel free to explore the rest of the building.
textByHashes.457a4c9d4f2180c7465386b69c7239dbd814482f: Very well. Return when you are able, but don't leave it too long. You'll benefit considerably from this training.
textByHashes.3bbdfd532675303fc2ae6bd11a9ccc685194110c: Now, please excuse me for a while. I have other matters to attend to. Do feel free to explore the rest of the building.
textByHashes.d8156e97c598ed09b66b45693d75913d30b97735: Excuse me a moment won't you. Do feel free to explore the rest of the building
textByHashes.544378ce07ad771c942ccc2ab7a6b59a3ba7f7fb: Hello there! How are you enjoying the Legends Guild?
textByHashes.a7655338dcb8d2e432305e765b0e587b278fe388: That's nice. Excuse me now, I have other matters to attend to. Please feel free to explore the rest of the building.
textByHashes.7416ec3129e7204a135302128bfee0569ed8a6ef: One of our other members visited the Kharazi Jungle, following in your illustrious footsteps, and they found some weird daggers. Would you like one?
textByHashes.bf4dbb62517bf11a2bd2e7537c0d6401e1061af6: Hello there. I have something for you. Enjoy!
textByHashes.2eb6ab3f58907aa0a9c0b4439c6ca4fb260d5539: Hey, I think it's about time you started buying your own machetes. I'm sure there must be some jungle native down in Karamja who can sell you one.
textByHashes.b96217e59d82230d25ebf613d7d015d01bd77452: That doesn't look solved to me.
